title: Platform Geometry
description: Geometrical information about a specific platform.

ccrp_m.title: CCRP
ccrp_m.description: Consistent Common Reference Point position in the platform local coordinate system (X forward, Y starboard, Z down).

mmsi_number.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) number. Used for AIS identification.

imo_number.description: IMO ship identification number. Use 0 if not assigned (e.g. small craft).

call_sign.description: Radio call sign assigned to this platform.

operational_limits.title: Operational Limits
operational_limits.description: Operational envelope of this platform. Used by supervision and mission planning systems.

vessel_outlines.title: Vessel Outlines
vessel_outlines.description: Named hull cross-section polygons in body-frame coordinates (meters relative to CCRP). Keys are outline names (e.g. complex_max, waterline, above_waterline_1m). Coordinate convention: X = forward (bow), Y = starboard.

description.description: Human-readable label for this outline cross-section.

coordinates_m.description: Closed polygon ring of [x_forward_m, y_starboard_m] points relative to CCRP.

sensor_type.description: Type of sensor mounted at this frame (optional, for service discovery and visualization).

sensor_description.description: Human-readable label for the sensor at this frame.

translation_m.title: Translation
translation_m.description: A translation in meters of the child frame in relation to the parent frame expressed in the parent frame of reference.

rotation_deg.title: Rotation
rotation_deg.description: A rotation in degrees of the child frame in relation to the parent frame expressed in the parent frame of reference given as Euler angles applied in the order YAW -> PITCH -> ROLL
